out_of_scope_note: First-person commentary/opinion piece (preprint) discussing institutional and sociological issues around the ARC-Cogitate adversarial collaboration on theories of consciousness and a related joint statement (Fleming et al. 2023). The paper is a philosophy/meta-science commentary with no empirical data, no computational model, no manipulations, and no perceptual/decision-making/encoding claim — it is a synthesis essay about how the field of consciousness science should operate. Falls under the 'philosophy of consciousness synthesis pieces' and 'editorial/opinion' out-of-scope categories: the lab tracks empirical research, not field-level commentary.
